# `difference` for [filters](/commands/categories/filters.md)

<div class='command-title'>Returns a list of unique elements in the input that are not present in the other list.</div>

## Signature

```> difference {flags} (other)```

## Parameters

 -  `other`: The other list to subtract from the input.


## Input/output types:

| input     | output    |
| --------- | --------- |
| list&lt;any&gt; | list&lt;any&gt; |
| table     | table     |
## Examples

Return the difference of two lists
```nu
> [1 2 3 4] | difference [3 4 5 6]
╭───┬───╮
│ 0 │ 1 │
│ 1 │ 2 │
╰───┴───╯

```

Difference with duplicates in input
```nu
> [1 1 2 3] | difference [2 3]
╭───┬───╮
│ 0 │ 1 │
╰───┴───╯

```

Difference of two tables
```nu
> [{a:1} {a:2} {a:3}] | difference [{a:2} {a:4}]
╭───┬───╮
│ # │ a │
├───┼───┤
│ 0 │ 1 │
│ 1 │ 3 │
╰───┴───╯

```
